optimization_1_feature_selection.description: Phase 1 training on all ~440 cols identified zero/low-importance features. Phase 2 retrained on 270 cols only. Reduces inference time proportionally to feature count reduction.

optimization_2_onnx_export.description: LightGBM model exported to ONNX format and run via ONNXRuntime. ONNX eliminates Python overhead in the prediction path — faster for single predictions especially.
